description: This image displays two logos: the Copernicus logo on the left and the European Commission logo on the right, both on a white background. The Copernicus logo features a large blue arc forming a stylized 'C' at the beginning of the word "Copernicus", which is written in dark blue sans-serif font. The dot above the 'i' in "Copernicus" is a solid yellow circle. The European Commission logo on the right consists of a dark blue rectangle with a circle of 12 yellow stars, representing the flag of the European Union. Below this, the words "European Commission" are written in white text, with a thin blue line underneath. Behind the blue rectangle, a stylized grey graphical element resembles architectural lines or a waving banner.
